expectations.text: References controller review_scope_files as the authoritative source
expectations.evidence: The response centers reconciliation on `review_scope_files` and tells the reviewer to return to the `controller-defined scope`.

expectations.text: Identifies mismatch between reviewer-reported lists and authoritative scope
expectations.evidence: It explicitly says `Reviewer file-list mismatch detected` and compares reviewer-reported lists against the scope.

expectations.text: Reports missing and extra files based on reconciliation
expectations.evidence: The reconciliation block reports `Missing in-scope files: docs/notes.md` and `Extra out-of-scope files: scripts/helper.sh`.

expectations.text: Marks completion as INCOMPLETE until mismatch is resolved or explicitly deferred/approved
expectations.evidence: The coverage block marks status `INCOMPLETE` and the next action says to finish review before closing unless explicitly deferred/approved.

claims.evidence: The response lists `scripts/helper.sh` under `Extra out-of-scope files`.

claims.claim: Review closure is blocked until scope mismatch is reconciled.
claims.evidence: The next action says to complete review of `docs/notes.md` before closing the review.
